query:
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  COUNT(sba.serviceExternalId) as assignedServices
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = bi.customerExternalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT customerExternalId FROM services 
  WHERE externalId IN ('SHB64AC','S72C54J','SHU42OX','SGVQT30','S1UMC04','SEEV150','SKY3MLC','SSE3JV7','SZR96SE','SGBHVJV','S66U54A')
)
AND bi.lineAmount > 0
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.customerExternalId, c.name
ORDER BY c.name, bi.lineAmount DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  COUNT(sba.serviceExternalId) as assignedServices
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = bi.customerExternalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT customerExternalId FROM services 
  WHERE externalId IN ('SHB64AC','S72C54J','SHU42OX','SGVQT30','S1UMC04','SEEV150','SKY3MLC','SSE3JV7','SZR96SE','SGBHVJV','S66U54A')
)
AND bi.lineAmount > 0
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.customerExternalId, c.name
ORDER BY c.name, bi.lineAmount DESC;
